debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : NormedAddCommGroup E
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
X : ι → Ω → E
inst✝⁴ : LinearOrder ι
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
inst✝³ : OrderBot ι
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝¹ : OrderTopology ι
inst✝ : MeasurableSpace ι
hX :
  Locally
    (fun x =>
      @ProbabilityTheory.ClassDL ι Ω E inst✝⁵ mΩ instDistribLatticeOfLinearOrder.toSemilatticeInf.toPreorder ⋯ inst✝ x 𝓕
        P)
    𝓕 X P
h𝓕 : 𝓕.IsRightContinuous
⊢ Locally
    (fun x =>
      @ProbabilityTheory.ClassD ι Ω E inst✝⁵ mΩ instDistribLatticeOfLinearOrder.toSemilatticeInf.toPreorder ⋯ inst✝ x 𝓕
        P)
    𝓕 X P

failed_attempts: exact Locally.of_isStable isStable_classDL isStable_classD (fun _ hDL => hDL.locally_classD) hX
exact Locally.flatten isStable_classD (Locally.mono (fun _ h => h.locally_classD) hX)
exact hX.mono' (fun Y hY => hY.locally_classD) isStable_classDL isStable_classD

rcases topOrderOrNoTopOrder ι with ha | hb
  · exact locally_of_prop (Locally.prop isStable_classDL hX).classD
  · haveI : SecondCountableTopology ι := by infer_instance
    haveI : BorelSpace ι := by infer_instance
    haveI : PseudoMetrizableSpace ι := by infer_instance
    exact Locally.locally isStable_classD (fun _ hY => hY.locally_classD) hX
exact Locally.locally isStable_classD (Locally.mono hX (fun _ hY => hY.locally_classD))
exact Locally.weaken hX (fun _ hY => hY.locally_classD) isStable_classD
exact Locally.trans isStable_classDL hX (fun _ hY => hY.locally_classD)
exact Locally.of_locally (Locally.mono hX (fun _ hY => hY.locally_classD) isStable_classDL) isStable_classD
exact Locally.of_locally isStable_classD hX (fun _ hY => hY.locally_classD)

obtain ⟨τ, hτ_stop, hτ_classDL⟩ := hX
  exact ⟨τ, hτ_stop, fun n => (hτ_classDL n).locally_classD⟩
exact Locally.of_forall_locally isStable_classD hX (fun _ hY => hY.locally_classD)
